title: Papyrus #0353: Greek-Egyptian Sale Document
description: A Greek papyrus from Hellenistic/Roman Egypt — sale document document.
introduction: A Greek papyrus from Hellenistic/Roman Egypt — sale document document.

translation.text: From the papyrus collections of Greco-Roman Egypt: a sale document document preserved in the dry sands. These papyri document daily life in ways no monumental inscription can.
